channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: President Murmu calls for inclusive society beyond caste divisions on Ambedkar Jayanti
item.description: President Droupadi Murmu, speaking at the Samajik Samrasta Mahotsav held in Gandhinagar on the occasion of B. R. Ambedkar’s birth anniversary, called upon citizens to move beyond caste divisions and w...

item.title: Maduka Okoye Reflect On Udinese’s Dominant 3-0 Win Over AC Milan At San Siro
item.description: Udinese goalkeeper Maduka Okoye talk about how special their 3-0 win against AC Milan be for all the players, saying e go remain unforgettable for the whole team. The match wey happen for the famous S...

item.title: Mudavadi Receives Report to Improve Management of Diplomatic Privileges and UN Relations in Kenya
item.description: Prime Cabinet Secretary and Cabinet Secretary for Foreign and Diaspora Affairs, Musalia Mudavadi, has officially received a comparative study report that focuses on enhancing the administration and ma...

item.title: 87-year-old bushwalker survives cold night in WA bushland after getting lost
item.description: An 87-year-old woman has survived a harsh, near-freezing night in the south-west of Western Australia after becoming lost while bushwalking. The elderly hiker, whose name has not been released, was re...

item.title: Trump Rejects Long-Term Uranium Enrichment Suspension Proposal in Iran–U.S. Cease-Fire Talks
item.description: During the latest round of Iran–U.S. negotiations aimed at reducing tension and reaching a cease-fire agreement, former U.S. President Donald Trump stated that he disapproved of a proposal suggesting ...

item.title: Examining the Cultural Impact of 'Shaddap You Face' in Australia
item.description: Joe Dolce’s 1980 hit 'Shaddap You Face' recently gained recognition by being inducted into the National Film and Sound Archive’s Sounds of Australia collection, also being named the country’s best nov...

item.title: Rising British Talent Featured in Forbes 30 Under 30 2026 List
item.description: The 2026 Forbes 30 Under 30 list honours a diverse group of young British talents from sports, entertainment, media, and entrepreneurship. Standouts include Owen Cooper, the 16-year-old actor who gain...

item.title: Stokes dismisses rift speculation with McCullum after Ashes defeat and stresses ongoing England collaboration
item.description: England Test captain Ben Stokes has moved to calm speculation about a possible falling-out with head coach Brendon McCullum following England’s heavy Ashes defeat in Australia. Reports had suggested t...

item.title: Johannesburg High Court Orders Musa Khawula to Apologise to Julius Malema Over Defamatory Posts
item.description: The Johannesburg High Court has delivered a decisive judgment in favour of Economic Freedom Fighters (EFF) president Julius Malema in the defamation lawsuit he brought against social media personality...

item.title: South Africa Appoints New Deputy Director-General for HIV, AIDS, TB and STIs, Highlights Lenacapavir Rollout
item.description: South Africa has welcomed Dr Nonhlanhla Ndlovu as its Deputy Director-General for HIV, AIDS, TB and sexually transmitted infections. Spotlight interviewed Ndlovu regarding the upcoming public rollout ...

item.title: IMF Urges Caution on Budget Spending Amid Middle East Conflict and Rising Inflation
item.description: The International Monetary Fund has warned Australian Treasurer Jim Chalmers against using the upcoming federal budget to provide broad cost-of-living handouts to counter inflation driven by the ongoi...

item.title: Minimum Wage Increase Fails to Cover Basic Food Costs for South African Families
item.description: In March 2026, South Africa's National Minimum Wage was increased by 5% to R5,320.48 per month, equating to an hourly rate of R30.23 for a standard 22-day working month. Despite this increase, minimum...

item.title: Google introduces Chrome ‘Skills’ feature to save and reuse AI prompts across websites
item.description: Google has announced a new artificial intelligence feature for its Chrome browser called “Skills,” designed to let users save and reuse AI prompts across different websites. The feature builds on Chro...

item.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Visit Melbourne on Private Trip, Marking First Australia Return Since 2018
item.description: Prince Harry and Meghan, the Duke and Duchess of Sussex, have arrived in Melbourne, Australia, for a low-profile visit that is being privately funded rather than conducted as an official royal tour. T...

item.title: Horse trainer sentenced to prison for assaulting elderly man with hockey stick
item.description: A prominent horse trainer has been sentenced to prison following an incident in which he repeatedly assaulted an elderly pensioner using a hockey stick. The attack occurred during a dispute, leaving t...

item.title: Tanzanians continue to uphold peace and national unity in a changing society
item.description: The article highlights how Tanzanians have once again expressed their deep dedication to peace and national unity, stressing the importance of these values in sustaining stability and harmony across t...

item.title: Pakistan to Host Second Round of US-Iran Peace Talks Amid Ongoing Diplomacy
item.description: Pakistan is set to host a second round of US-Iran talks later this week, as both Washington and Tehran signal readiness to resume diplomatic negotiations. The first direct talks in Islamabad, which ha...

item.title: Supreme Court schedules hearing for PDP leader Turaki’s appeal to resolve party leadership matter quickly
item.description: The Supreme Court of Nigeria don announce the date for the hearing of appeal wey former Minister and PDP chieftain, Kabiru Turaki, file against the decision wey concern the leadership wahala inside th...

item.title: Victory Group secures $15m funding to expand tilapia farming operations in Kenya and Rwanda
item.description: Victory Group, a Kenya-based agribusiness company operating under Kivu Choice in Rwanda and Victory Farms in Kenya, has secured $15 million in funding from AgDevCo to expand its tilapia production acr...

item.title: President Ruto Backs Nyamira Railway, Unveils Ikonge Station Plans Worth Sh300 Million
item.description: During a development tour in Nyamira County, President William Ruto firmly defended the ongoing railway expansion in the region, addressing critics who had dismissed the viability of the project. Spea...
